missing_module: local service orchestration runner with live MySQL and Redis
expected_behavior: E2E runner starts web, admin, API, worker, MySQL, Redis, seed data, and exercises HTTP routes through the browser.
current_behavior: M15 smoke suite verifies the chain with test-only mock providers and in-memory repositories. It does not require local MySQL, Redis, Docker, or browser binaries.
recommended_fix: Add Playwright browser tests once staging-like local orchestration is stable.
reason: Browser-level process orchestration still belongs to staging setup, but local scripts and DB-ready pipeline are prepared.

blocked_flow: Stripe verified payment -> outbox -> GenerationManifest creation
missing_module: DB-backed worker processor that consumes order.paid and persists a GenerationManifest
expected_behavior: A verified Stripe webhook creates one order.paid outbox event and the worker creates a manifest with expected deliverables.
current_behavior: The M15.5 orchestration processor consumes order.paid into one idempotent GenerationManifest and one GenerationJob. A Prisma-backed repository is available for MySQL-backed execution, with in-memory fallback for tests.
recommended_fix: Implement DB-backed order.paid consumer before staging E2E.
milestone_to_fix: Milestone 15.5: Orchestration Gap Closure Before Staging
reason: processOrderPaidOutbox creates an idempotent GenerationManifest and GenerationJob from order.paid.

blocked_flow: GenerationManifest -> prompt rendering -> mock AI -> storage asset records
missing_module: single orchestrator that links generated candidates to required persisted assets for an order
expected_behavior: All required image, PDF, and ZIP assets are produced by worker jobs from the manifest.
current_behavior: The M15.5 manifest-driven pipeline creates the full MVP required asset set, enforces ZIP-after-required-assets ordering, completes the manifest, and records private asset metadata without public URLs.
recommended_fix: Implement manifest-driven worker orchestration with DB repositories.
milestone_to_fix: Milestone 15.5: Orchestration Gap Closure Before Staging
reason: runManifestDrivenGeneration creates all MVP required asset records, computes manifest completion, and blocks ZIP until non-ZIP assets exist.

missing_module: admin frontend API integration against real orders, jobs, manifests, assets, and logs
expected_behavior: Admin pages show live DB state and invoke guarded API mutations.
current_behavior: Admin service exposes DB-backed orchestration summaries for orders, manifests, assets, download tokens, and email logs. Browser-level admin UI integration remains part of staging validation.
recommended_fix: Connect admin pages to API endpoints before staging.
milestone_to_fix: Milestone 15.5: Orchestration Gap Closure Before Staging
reason: getAdminDbVisibilitySummary exposes DB-backed order, manifest, asset, download token, and email summaries with masked private fields.

blocked_flow: assets complete -> download token -> delivery email
missing_module: completion processor that creates token and queues email after all required assets are available
expected_behavior: Order completion automatically creates a download token and sends mock delivery email.
current_behavior: The M15.5 completion processor creates a hash-only download token, links all required assets, writes a mock delivery email log, and marks paid orders completed.
recommended_fix: Add completion orchestration and idempotency checks around delivery email.
milestone_to_fix: Milestone 15.5: Orchestration Gap Closure Before Staging
reason: completeOrderDelivery creates a hash-only token, email log, and completed order state after manifest completion.
